channel.title: Projects on javamurray.com
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on javamurray.com

item.title: Designing an Ornithopter
item.description:
Java Murray

DMA Project

Project Overview

This year, I’ve been working on a series of small, focused projects that all contribute to a larger goal, of designing and building an ornithopter. Each task helped me learn new skills in 3D design, prototyping, and engineering, all leading to my final concept.

item.title: Hydrontank Design
item.description:
Project Overview

This project started when Dr. Winter from Quantum Technology approached me with a design challenge: how would you suspend a hydrogen tank inside a vacuum chamber?

I was then asked to develop a CAD model of the concept we discussed so it could be included in a project proposal.

The Idea

The concept was to use Kevlar cables to suspend the tank inside the chamber. This would allow the position of the tank to be adjusted by tightening or loosening the cables, enabling fine alignment and controlled positioning within the system.
